nodes.context: Corsican organized crime group involved in extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, and political infiltration.
Corsican criminal clan, part of a coalition opposing the Petit Bar Gang.
Corsican nationalist movement, also referred to as the Orsoni clan, involved in political and criminal activities.

edges.context: The Petit Bar Gang and the Mattei clan are the two dominant blocs in Corsican organized crime, with a fragile balance of power.
The Petit Bar Gang is suspected of assassination attempts against members of the Orsoni clan, including Alain Orsoni and his son Guy Orsoni.
